reviews.comment:
Paramos con mi esposa. Compre un yogur y ensalada  de frutas. Un asco ambos.
Encima todo sucio  adentro del local. Ni les molestaba  limpiar.  La verdad que desastre lamentablemente

(Translated by Google)
My wife and I stopped there. I bought yogurt and fruit salad. Both were disgusting. On top of that, the place was filthy inside. They didn't even bother to clean. It was a real disaster, unfortunately.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBc1lpV2R3EAE
